voice: Our brand voice is warm, empathetic, and reassuring, speaking with understated elegance and genuine respect. We aim to foster trust and comfort, always prioritizing dignity over clinical formality or patronizing tones.
logo_style_brief: An elegant humanist wordmark that subtly integrates a protective or nurturing gesture glyph, conveying care and dignity without being overly literal or childish.
photo_style_tokens: golden-hour warmth, soft natural light, genuine connection, editorial documentary feel

facts_from_brief.Core Values: warm, respectful, trustworthy, and modern brand that truly puts both seniors and caregivers first — dignity-first care
facts_from_brief.Partnership Scope: long-term partner (part-time to start, with potential to scale as the company grows)

invented: specific hex codes for the palette
